title: Improve visibility - Names in Gantt + items in Dropdown

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would love having the option to expand the name in the gantt view but its currently blocked.

Same thing for the dropdown list I would love to have the possibility to expland the window when I have multiple items and the list is huge.

Thanks,

image567×590 39.4 KB

posts.author: rblessing93 (Rose Blessing)
posts.cookedHtml: Why is this not a thing yet? Seriously Monday?

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: I guess yes still, but they expanded the dropdown box at least.
